title: Design Dynamic Array
description: Design a resizable array (similar to ArrayList/vector). Implement: pushback(val), popback(), get(i), resize() that doubles capacity when full. Start with capacity 1.
key_concept: Amortized O(1) pushback via doubling strategy. Total work for n pushes = 1+2+4+...+n = O(n), so per-push amortized O(1).

hints.L1: Maintain capacity, size, and an inner fixed array. When size==capacity, create new array with 2x capacity and copy.
hints.L2: pushback: if size==capacity, resize. arr[size]=val; size++. popback: size--; return arr[size]. get(i): return arr[i].
hints.L3: resize: newArr=new Array(capacity*2); copy all; capacity*=2; arr=newArr
